title: coprosma tahitensis var. raiateensis
intro: Coprosma tahitensis var. raiateensis, also known as the Raiatea coprosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a small, shrubby plant native to the Society Islands in French Polynesia, and its leaves have been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to their medicinal properties. The leaves of Coprosma tahitensis var. raiateensis have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall health.
